relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: After Nadab and Abihu, YHWH speaks about dangerous nearness.
Aaron may not enter the innermost place at any time; the cloud over the cover is holy danger.
He enters only with appointed offerings.
He washes and wears linen humility before the holy.
The congregation gives two goats and a ram.
Aaron first makes covering for himself and his house.
Two goats stand before YHWH at the tent entrance.
Lots distinguish the goat for YHWH and the goat for Azazel.
The goat for YHWH becomes purification offering.
The living goat is kept for removal into wilderness.
Aaron begins again with covering for himself.
Coals and fragrant incense enter inside the veil.
The incense cloud covers the cover so life is preserved.
Bull blood/life is sprinkled before the cover.
The people's goat blood/life is brought inside the veil.
The holy place is cleansed from the people's uncleannesses, transgressions, and misalignments.
No one else enters while covering is made for priest, house, and assembly.
The outer altar too receives covering.
Sevenfold sprinkling cleanses and sanctifies the altar.
When sanctuary, tent, and altar are cleansed, the living goat is brought.
Aaron lays both hands and confesses all Israel's burdens onto the living goat.
The goat carries iniquities into cut-off wilderness.
Aaron removes the linen garments and leaves them there.
He washes, changes, and offers for himself and the people.
The fat of the purification offering rises.
The one who sends the goat washes before returning.
The offerings whose blood/life went inward are burned outside camp.
The burner washes and returns.
On the tenth day of the seventh month, native and sojourner humble their souls and cease work.
On this day covering cleanses the people before YHWH.
It is Sabbath of deep rest and soul-humbling.
The anointed priest continues the rite in linen garments.
Holy sanctuary, tent, altar, priests, and people all receive covering.
Once a year, Israel is cleansed from all misalignments as YHWH commanded.

contemplative_note: Leviticus 16 is the great release: sanctuary cleansed, burdens confessed, the living goat carrying what cannot remain into wilderness, and the whole people resting into renewed cleanness.
